熱刺是一間座落英國倫敦北部托定咸區的職業足球會
從1882年成立至今已經擁有過百年歷史，現時競逐於英格蘭超級聯賽；
球會主場為熱刺球場，球會的拉丁文格言 ”Audere est Facere (To Dare Is To Do)” 則意謂「敢作敢為」


榮譽：

甲組聯賽 冠軍：1950/1951、1960/1961
足總盃 冠軍：1900/1901、1920/1921、1960/1961、1961/1962、1966/1967、1980/1981、1981/1982、1990/1991
聯賽盃 冠軍：1970/1971、1972/1973、1998/1999、2007/2008
歐洲盃賽冠軍盃 冠軍：1962/1963
歐洲足協杯 冠軍：1971/1972、1983/1984
賽馬會傑志中心挑戰盃 冠軍：2017/2018
國際冠軍盃 冠軍：2018/2019

根據《阿斯報》今天封面消息，皇馬已經與埃裏克森就夏天加盟有口頭協議，他們已經開始與熱刺進行接洽，這也是皇馬目前行動比較快的一樁交易。
《阿斯報》今天封面以“埃裏克森，口頭協議”為題報道了皇馬在埃裏克森轉會上的最新進展：根據《阿斯報》透露，埃裏克森的經紀人已經拒絕了其他俱樂部的邀請，他們與皇馬有口頭的預先協議。
目前埃裏克森年薪大約為400萬歐元，如果加盟皇馬，這個數字將大幅度提高。而在與凱恩和阿裏續約之後，目前埃裏克森與熱刺的續約已經停滯不前，另外，熱刺的新主場也讓他們的現金流顯得非常緊張
《阿斯報》表示，目前皇馬已經開始與熱刺接觸，這也是目前皇馬唯一仍然在明確進行的談判。英國媒體稱，熱刺為埃裏克森標價下降到了1.5億歐元，而皇馬希望能夠進一步壓價。
而另一方面，皇馬方面對於博格巴的轉會仍然沒有明確的進展，雖然此前《阿斯報》表示，皇馬與博格巴達成了一致，但是曼聯方面似乎並不願意與皇馬坐在談判桌上。
岩岩先睇到 好似都幾可信...

Mauricio Pochettino is expected to be asked to work miracles with his Tottenham Hotspur squad again next season, with a number of their Premier League rivals preparing to outspend them.

Spurs chairman Daniel Levy is ready to sanction a £30million move for midfielder Andre Gomes, who has spent the season on loan at Everton from Barcelona, while Tottenham are among a number of clubs to have made enquires about Nice right-back Youcef Atal, who would cost at least £34m.

Given Pochettino also wants to add an attacking player to his squad, Tottenham’s summer spend could easily push towards the £100m mark, particularly if the likes of Christian Eriksen, Kieran Trippier and Toby Alderweireld leave, but sources currently rate it unlikely that Spurs will make more than two or three significant signings.

Jan was immediately withdrawn as a result of the player informing medical staff that symptoms were developing suddenly and that he no longer felt stable standing up. We have been advised that this was the result of a presyncopal episode, a near faint.

“Contrast that relaxed approach with negotiating under pressure,” he wrote. “Daniel Levy, chairman of Tottenham, nailed us to the flagpole in 2008 when he took us all the way to the last day of the transfer window before agreeing terms for Dimitar Berbatov, Tottenham’s talented Bulgarian striker in whom we had long had an interest.

“Then Levy came back to us and said he needed Frazier Campbell, one of our young strikers, as part of the deal. [Chief executive] David Gill demurred, so Levy then upped Berbatov’s transfer fee a little. "That whole experience was more painful than my hip replacement.”
